text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Judging from the agenda... I think it's safe to
assume my next student council meeting will run
late.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, if you have time that day, would you
mind watering the flowers for me?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I will only say this once, but please be sure to not
overwater the plants.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Too much water will lead to root rot. You must
observe the soil's condition and make a
judgement based on that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If I said it's similar to training Umamusume, you'd
understand, wouldn't you?
